name: Goroutine leak — ProcessJobs launches goroutines with no WaitGroup or cancellation
description: ProcessJobs iterates over a job slice and launches one goroutine per job using 'go func(j Job) {...}(job)' without any synchronisation. There is no sync.WaitGroup, no done channel, and context cancellation is not propagated to stop goroutines. The function returns immediately, leaving goroutines that may outlive the caller.

expected_findings.description: ProcessJobs launches goroutines with no WaitGroup or cancellation mechanism. The function returns before goroutines complete, and there is no way to stop or join them — goroutines leak on every call.

expected_clean.description: Minimal HTTP server setup with no concurrency bugs
